info.name: Mutabiq.AI API Collection
info.description: Comprehensive API collection for Mutabiq.AI platform covering all endpoints including authentication, organizations, projects, AI models, compliance, and more.

item.name: Authentication

request.description:
Authenticate user with email and password. Returns access token.

**Required Fields:**
- `email` (string): Valid email address
- `password` (string): User password

Accept a team invitation and create a new user account.

**Required Fields:**
- `name` (string, max 255): Full name
- `password` (string, min 8): User password
- `token` (string): Invitation token received via email

item.description: Endpoints for user authentication and invitation acceptance

request.description:
Get the authenticated user's profile information.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

item.name: Billing & Subscriptions

request.description:
Retrieve all active subscription plans.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Subscribe to a specific plan, upgrade, or downgrade current subscription.

**Path Parameters:**
- `plan` (integer): Plan ID

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

**Note:** User must have a payment method added before subscribing.

Cancel the active subscription.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Retrieve all invoices for the authenticated user.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Retrieve the upcoming invoice for the active subscription.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Get redirect URL to Stripe billing portal to add a payment method.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

item.description: Billing, subscription, and payment method management endpoints

request.description:
Get all organizations for the authenticated user with members.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Create a new organization.

**Required Fields:**
- `name` (string, max 255): Organization name
- `is_active` (boolean): Active status

**Optional Fields:**
- `website` (string, max 255, URL): Organization website (must be unique)
- `phone` (string, max 20): Phone number (must be unique)
- `country` (string, max 500): Country name

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)
**Authorization:** User must have permission to create organizations

Get all members of the user's organization.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Update a team member's details.

**Path Parameters:**
- `user` (integer): User ID

**Required Fields:**
- `name` (string, max 255): Member's name
- `role` (string): Member role

**Role Options:**
- `owner`
- `project_lead`
- `reviewer`
- `contributor`
- `auditor`

**Note:** Cannot assign `admin` or `super_admin` roles

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Delete a team member.

**Path Parameters:**
- `user` (integer): User ID

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Invite new members to the organization.

**Required Fields:**
- `members` (array, min 1): Array of member invitations
- `members.*.email` (string, max 255): Valid email address
- `members.*.role` (string): User role

**Role Options:**
- `super_admin`
- `admin`
- `owner`
- `project_lead`
- `reviewer`
- `contributor`
- `auditor`

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

query.description: Search term for framework name or description

request.description:
Get all published frameworks with optional filtering.

**Optional Query Parameters:**
- `search` (string): Search in framework name or description
- `category` (string): Filter by framework category

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Get details of a specific framework.

**Path Parameters:**
- `framework` (integer): Framework ID

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

query.description: Filter by governance pillar (ai_governance, data_governance, privacy_pdpl)

request.description:
Get filtered list of projects for the authenticated user.

**Optional Query Parameters:**
- `name` (string, max 255): Filter by project name
- `governance_pillar` (string, max 255): Filter by governance pillar
- `per_page` (integer, 1-100): Results per page

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Create a new project.

**Required Fields:**
- `name` (string, max 255): Project name
- `governance_pillar` (string): Governance pillar

**Governance Pillar Options:**
- `ai_governance`
- `data_governance`
- `privacy_pdpl`

**Optional Fields:**
- `description` (string): Project description

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Get details of a specific project.

**Path Parameters:**
- `project` (integer): Project ID

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Add a member to a project.

**Path Parameters:**
- `project` (integer): Project ID

**Required Fields:**
- `user_id` (integer): User ID (must exist in users table)
- `role` (string): Project role

**Role Options:**
- `editor`
- `reviewer`
- `auditor`

**Note:** Cannot assign `owner` role

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)
**Authorization:** User must have permission to add members to the project

Add a framework to a project.

**Path Parameters:**
- `project` (integer): Project ID

**Required Fields:**
- `framework_id` (integer): Framework ID

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Get all AI models for the user's organization.

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)
**Note:** User must belong to an organization

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Customer Sentiment Analysis Model",
    "description": "ML model for analyzing customer feedback sentiment",
    "source_org_stakeholder_id": 1,
    "owner_stakeholder_id": 2,
    "vendor_id": null,
    "primary_category": "traditional_ml", // [traditional_ml, deep_learning, generative_ai, ai_agents, specialized_ai, foundation_models, multimodal_ai]
    "type": "Classification",
    "domain_specialization": "Natural Language Processing",
    "operational_status": "production", // [not_deployed, development, testing, production]
    "business_status": "active", // [planned, active, deprecated, retired]
    "regulatory_risk_classification": "Low Risk",
    "ownership_type": "internal", // [internal, external, joint, licensed, open_source, saas]
    "development_source": "internal_development" // [internal_development, external_vendor, open_source_community, cloud_provider, partnership]
}

request.description:
Create a new AI model.

**Required Fields:**
- `name` (string, max 255): AI model name
- `source_org_stakeholder_id` (integer): Source organization stakeholder ID (must exist)
- `primary_category` (string): Primary category
- `type` (string, max 255): Model type
- `operational_status` (string): Operational status
- `business_status` (string): Business status
- `ownership_type` (string): Ownership type
- `development_source` (string): Development source

**Primary Category Options:**
- `traditional_ml`
- `deep_learning`
- `generative_ai`
- `ai_agents`
- `specialized_ai`
- `foundation_models`
- `multimodal_ai`

**Operational Status Options:**
- `not_deployed`
- `development`
- `testing`
- `production`

**Business Status Options:**
- `planned`
- `active`
- `deprecated`
- `retired`

**Ownership Type Options:**
- `internal`
- `external`
- `joint`
- `licensed`
- `open_source`
- `saas`

**Development Source Options:**
- `internal_development`
- `external_vendor`
- `open_source_community`
- `cloud_provider`
- `partnership`

**Optional Fields:**
- `description` (string): Model description
- `owner_stakeholder_id` (integer): Owner stakeholder ID
- `vendor_id` (integer): Vendor ID
- `domain_specialization` (string, max 255): Domain specialization
- `regulatory_risk_classification` (string, max 255): Risk classification

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)
**Note:** User must belong to an organization

Get details of a specific AI model.

**Path Parameters:**
- `aiModel` (integer): AI Model ID

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

query.description: Filter by version type (major, minor, patch, experimental)

request.description:
Get all AI model versions for the user's organization with optional filtering.

**Optional Query Parameters:**
- `ai_model_id` (integer): Filter by AI Model ID
- `version_type` (string): Filter by version type
- `deployment_status` (string): Filter by deployment status
- `per_page` (integer): Results per page

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

body.raw:
{
    "version_number": "2.1.0",
    "version_type": "minor", // [major, minor, patch, experimental]
    "ai_model_id": 1,
    "description": "Enhanced sentiment analysis with improved accuracy",
    "version_role": "Production Release",
    "version_source": "Internal Development",
    "our_involvement": "Full Development",
    "release_date": "2025-11-04",
    "release_notes": "Improved accuracy by 15%, added support for multilingual sentiment analysis",
    "architecture_type": "Transformer-based Neural Network",
    "model_file_size_gb": 2.5,
    "training_duration_hours": 48,
    "complexity_level": "moderate", // [simple, moderate, complex, massive]
    "parameter_count": 350000000,
    "input_modalities": ["text"], // Options: [text, image, audio, video, structured_data, time_series]
    "output_modalities": ["classification"], // Options: [text, image, audio, classification, regression, embedding, structured_data]
    "deployment_status": "deployed", // [not_deployed, deploying, deployed, failed, rollback]
    "lifecycle_stage": "production", // [development, testing, staging, production, deprecated, retired]
    "deployment_environments": ["Production", "Staging"],
    "has_performance_data": true
}

request.description:
Create a new AI model version.

**Required Fields:**
- `version_number` (string, max 255): Version number (e.g., "2.1.0")
- `version_type` (string): Type of version
- `ai_model_id` (integer): AI Model ID (must exist)
- `architecture_type` (string, max 255): Architecture description
- `model_file_size_gb` (number, min 0): Model size in GB
- `complexity_level` (string): Complexity level
- `deployment_status` (string): Current deployment status
- `lifecycle_stage` (string): Current lifecycle stage

**Version Type Options:**
- `major`
- `minor`
- `patch`
- `experimental`

**Complexity Level Options:**
- `simple`
- `moderate`
- `complex`
- `massive`

**Deployment Status Options:**
- `not_deployed`
- `deploying`
- `deployed`
- `failed`
- `rollback`

**Lifecycle Stage Options:**
- `development`
- `testing`
- `staging`
- `production`
- `deprecated`
- `retired`

**Input Modalities Options:**
- `text`
- `image`
- `audio`
- `video`
- `structured_data`
- `time_series`

**Output Modalities Options:**
- `text`
- `image`
- `audio`
- `classification`
- `regression`
- `embedding`
- `structured_data`

**Optional Fields:**
- `description` (string, max 1000): Version description
- `version_role` (string, max 255): Role of this version
- `version_source` (string, max 255): Source of version
- `our_involvement` (string, max 255): Organization's involvement
- `release_date` (date): Release date
- `release_notes` (string): Detailed release notes
- `training_duration_hours` (integer, min 0): Training duration
- `parameter_count` (integer, min 0): Number of parameters
- `input_modalities` (array): Input modality types
- `output_modalities` (array): Output modality types
- `deployment_environments` (array): Deployment environment names
- `has_performance_data` (boolean): Whether performance data exists

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Get details of a specific AI model version.

**Path Parameters:**
- `aiModelVersion` (integer): AI Model Version ID

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

body.raw:
{
    "version_number": "2.1.1",
    "description": "Bug fixes and performance improvements",
    "deployment_status": "deployed", // [not_deployed, deploying, deployed, failed, rollback]
    "lifecycle_stage": "production", // [development, testing, staging, production, deprecated, retired]
    "release_notes": "Fixed memory leak issue, improved response time by 20%",
    "has_performance_data": true
}

request.description:
Update an existing AI model version.

**Path Parameters:**
- `aiModelVersion` (integer): AI Model Version ID

**All fields are optional (use 'sometimes' validation):**
- `version_number` (string, max 255)
- `version_type` (string): [major, minor, patch, experimental]
- `description` (string, max 1000)
- `version_role` (string, max 255)
- `version_source` (string, max 255)
- `our_involvement` (string, max 255)
- `release_date` (date)
- `release_notes` (string)
- `architecture_type` (string, max 255)
- `model_file_size_gb` (number, min 0)
- `training_duration_hours` (integer, min 0)
- `complexity_level` (string): [simple, moderate, complex, massive]
- `parameter_count` (integer, min 0)
- `input_modalities` (array): [text, image, audio, video, structured_data, time_series]
- `output_modalities` (array): [text, image, audio, classification, regression, embedding, structured_data]
- `deployment_status` (string): [not_deployed, deploying, deployed, failed, rollback]
- `lifecycle_stage` (string): [development, testing, staging, production, deprecated, retired]
- `deployment_environments` (array)
- `has_performance_data` (boolean)

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

item.name: AI Model Cards

request.description:
Get paginated list of AI model cards for the user's organization.

**Optional Query Parameters:**
- `per_page` (integer): Results per page (default: 15)

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

body.raw:
{
    "version_id": 1,
    "title": "Customer Sentiment Analysis Model Card v2.1",
    "creator_role": "internal_team", // [internal_team, vendor_provided, community_contributed, auto_generated]
    "owner_stakeholder_id": 1,
    "format": "standard", // [standard, regulatory, industry_specific, custom]
    "model_overview": "This model analyzes customer feedback to determine sentiment (positive, negative, neutral). It uses a transformer-based architecture trained on 2M customer reviews.",
    "intended_use": "Designed for analyzing customer feedback in e-commerce platforms. Should be used for sentiment classification only, not for generating responses.",
    "training_data_overview": "Trained on 2 million customer reviews from diverse e-commerce platforms, covering 10 product categories. Data collected between 2020-2024.",
    "bias_evaluation_methods": "Tested across demographic groups, geographic regions, and product categories. Bias metrics calculated using disparate impact analysis.",
    "model_limitations": "May underperform on sarcastic or highly contextual language. Limited to English language only. Not suitable for nuanced emotion detection.",
    "ethical_considerations": "Ensure diverse representation in training data. Monitor for bias in production. Do not use for individual profiling or discriminatory decisions.",
    "organizational_context": {"department": "Customer Experience", "compliance_framework": "ISO 27001"},
    "performance_summary": "Accuracy: 94.2%, Precision: 93.8%, Recall: 94.5%, F1-Score: 94.1%. Tested on 500K reviews.",
    "risk_summary": "Low risk classification. Primary risks include bias in underrepresented categories and privacy concerns with training data.",
    "status": "approved", // [draft, in_review, approved, published, archived]
    "publication_status": "published_internal", // [not_published, published_internal, published_public]
    "publication_date": "2025-11-04",
    "last_review_date": "2025-11-01",
    "next_review_date": "2026-05-01"
}

request.description:
Create a new AI model card for documenting model details, ethics, and compliance.

**Required Fields:**
- `version_id` (integer): AI Model Version ID (must exist)
- `title` (string, min 10, max 255): Card title
- `creator_role` (string): Role of card creator
- `owner_stakeholder_id` (integer): Owner stakeholder ID (must exist)
- `format` (string): Card format type
- `model_overview` (string): Overview of the model
- `intended_use` (string): Intended use cases
- `training_data_overview` (string): Training data description
- `bias_evaluation_methods` (string): How bias was evaluated
- `model_limitations` (string): Known limitations
- `ethical_considerations` (string): Ethical considerations
- `performance_summary` (string): Performance metrics summary
- `risk_summary` (string): Risk assessment summary
- `status` (string): Current status
- `publication_status` (string): Publication status

**Creator Role Options:**
- `internal_team`
- `vendor_provided`
- `community_contributed`
- `auto_generated`

**Format Options:**
- `standard`
- `regulatory`
- `industry_specific`
- `custom`

**Status Options:**
- `draft`
- `in_review`
- `approved`
- `published`
- `archived`

**Publication Status Options:**
- `not_published`
- `published_internal`
- `published_public`

**Optional Fields:**
- `organizational_context` (object/JSON): Additional context
- `publication_date` (date): When published
- `last_review_date` (date): Last review date
- `next_review_date` (date): Next scheduled review

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Get details of a specific AI model card.

**Path Parameters:**
- `aiModelCard` (integer): AI Model Card ID

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Customer Sentiment Analysis Model Card v2.1.1",
    "model_limitations": "May underperform on sarcastic or highly contextual language. Limited to English language only. Not suitable for nuanced emotion detection. Updated: Added handling for emojis.",
    "performance_summary": "Accuracy: 94.8%, Precision: 94.2%, Recall: 94.9%, F1-Score: 94.5%. Tested on 500K reviews. Improved by 0.6% after latest update.",
    "status": "approved", // [draft, in_review, approved, published, archived]
    "last_review_date": "2025-11-04"
}

request.description:
Update an existing AI model card.

**Path Parameters:**
- `aiModelCard` (integer): AI Model Card ID

**All fields are optional:**
- `version_id` (integer): AI Model Version ID
- `title` (string, min 10, max 255): Card title
- `creator_role` (string): [internal_team, vendor_provided, community_contributed, auto_generated]
- `owner_stakeholder_id` (integer): Owner stakeholder ID
- `format` (string): [standard, regulatory, industry_specific, custom]
- `model_overview` (string): Model overview
- `intended_use` (string): Intended use cases
- `training_data_overview` (string): Training data description
- `bias_evaluation_methods` (string): Bias evaluation methods
- `model_limitations` (string): Known limitations
- `ethical_considerations` (string): Ethical considerations
- `organizational_context` (object/JSON): Additional context
- `performance_summary` (string): Performance metrics
- `risk_summary` (string): Risk assessment
- `status` (string): [draft, in_review, approved, published, archived]
- `publication_status` (string): [not_published, published_internal, published_public]
- `publication_date` (date): Publication date
- `last_review_date` (date): Last review date
- `next_review_date` (date): Next review date

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

item.description: AI Model Card documentation endpoints for ethical AI governance

item.name: Use Cases

request.description:
Get filtered list of use cases for the user's organization.

**Optional Query Parameters:**
- `name` (string, max 255): Filter by use case name
- `status` (string): Filter by status
- `per_page` (integer, 1-100): Results per page

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Customer Churn Prediction",
    "description": "This use case involves developing an AI model to predict customer churn by analyzing customer behavior, transaction history, and engagement patterns. The goal is to identify at-risk customers early and enable proactive retention strategies.",
    "business_objective": "Reduce customer churn rate by 25% through early identification of at-risk customers and implementation of targeted retention campaigns.",
    "business_owner_id": 1,
    "technical_owner_id": 2,
    "business_domain": "customer_service", // [customer_service, fraud_detection, marketing, operations, risk_management, hr, finance, legal, product_development, supply_chain]
    "roi_classification": "High", // [High, Medium, Low]
    "priority": "High", // [High, Medium, Low]
    "risk_level": "medium", // [low, medium, high, critical]
    "data_sensitivity": "confidential", // [public, internal, confidential, restricted]
    "expected_roi_percentage": 150.50,
    "budget_allocated": 250000,
    "target_go_live_date": "2026-03-01",
    "status": "approved", // [draft, under_review, approved, in_development, testing, staging, active, suspended, deprecated]
    "created_by": "user@example.com",
    "updated_by": "user@example.com",
    "roi_assessment": true,
    "risk_assessment": true,
    "data_assessment": true,
    "estimated_implementation_cost": 200000,
    "estimated_reduction_in_time": 500,
    "estimated_reduction_in_cost": 300000,
    "estimated_revenue_increase": 750000,
    "estimated_fte_capacity_saving": 3,
    "data_availability_status": "available", // [available, partially available, not available]
    "data_readiness": "D3" // [D1, D2, D3, D4]
}

request.description:
Create a new use case for AI implementation.

**Required Fields:**
- `name` (string, min 5, max 255): Use case name
- `description` (string, min 100, max 5000): Detailed description
- `business_objective` (string, min 50, max 2000): Business objective
- `business_domain` (string): Business domain
- `risk_level` (string): Risk level
- `data_sensitivity` (string): Data sensitivity level
- `status` (string): Current status
- `created_by` (email): Creator email

**Business Domain Options:**
- `customer_service`
- `fraud_detection`
- `marketing`
- `operations`
- `risk_management`
- `hr`
- `finance`
- `legal`
- `product_development`
- `supply_chain`

**ROI Classification Options:**
- `High`
- `Medium`
- `Low`

**Priority Options:**
- `High`
- `Medium`
- `Low`

**Risk Level Options:**
- `low`
- `medium`
- `high`
- `critical`

**Data Sensitivity Options:**
- `public`
- `internal`
- `confidential`
- `restricted`

**Status Options:**
- `draft`
- `under_review`
- `approved`
- `in_development`
- `testing`
- `staging`
- `active`
- `suspended`
- `deprecated`

**Data Availability Status Options:**
- `available`
- `partially available`
- `not available`

**Data Readiness Options:**
- `D1`
- `D2`
- `D3`
- `D4`

**Optional Fields:**
- `business_owner_id` (integer): Stakeholder ID
- `technical_owner_id` (integer): Stakeholder ID
- `roi_classification` (string): ROI classification
- `priority` (string): Priority level
- `expected_roi_percentage` (number, 0-999.99): Expected ROI
- `budget_allocated` (number): Budget amount
- `target_go_live_date` (date): Target launch date
- `updated_by` (email): Updater email
- `roi_assessment` (boolean): ROI assessed
- `risk_assessment` (boolean): Risk assessed
- `data_assessment` (boolean): Data assessed
- `estimated_implementation_cost` (number): Implementation cost
- `estimated_reduction_in_time` (number): Time savings
- `estimated_reduction_in_cost` (number): Cost savings
- `estimated_revenue_increase` (number): Revenue increase
- `estimated_fte_capacity_saving` (integer): FTE savings
- `data_availability_status` (string): Data availability
- `data_readiness` (string): Data readiness level

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

Get details of a specific use case.

**Path Parameters:**
- `useCase` (integer): Use Case ID

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

item.description: Use case management for AI implementations

item.name: AI Model Use Cases

request.description:
Get filtered list of AI model-use case associations.

**Required Query Parameters:**
- `ai_model_id` (integer): AI Model ID (must exist)

**Optional Query Parameters:**
- `per_page` (integer, min 1): Results per page

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

item.name: Create AI Model Use Case Association

request.description:
Create a new association between an AI model and a use case.

**Required Fields:**
- `ai_model_id` (integer): AI Model ID (must exist)
- `use_case_id` (integer): Use Case ID (must exist)
- `relationship_type` (string): Type of relationship

**Relationship Type Options:**
- `primary` - Primary model for this use case
- `secondary` - Secondary/backup model
- `experimental` - Experimental/testing model
- `backup` - Fallback model

**Optional Fields:**
- `ai_model_version_id` (integer): Specific version ID

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

item.name: Get AI Model Use Case Details

variable.description: AI Model Use Case Association ID

request.description:
Get details of a specific AI model-use case association.

**Path Parameters:**
- `aiModelUseCase` (integer): Association ID

**Returns:** Association details including related AI model, use case, version, and user info

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

variable.description: AI Model Use Case Association ID

request.description:
Update an existing AI model-use case association.

**Path Parameters:**
- `aiModelUseCase` (integer): Association ID

**All fields are optional:**
- `ai_model_id` (integer): AI Model ID
- `use_case_id` (integer): Use Case ID
- `ai_model_version_id` (integer): Version ID
- `relationship_type` (string): [primary, secondary, experimental, backup]

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

variable.description: AI Model Use Case Association ID

request.description:
Delete an AI model-use case association.

**Path Parameters:**
- `aiModelUseCase` (integer): Association ID

**Authentication:** Required (Bearer Token)

item.description: Manage associations between AI models and use cases
